name: skill-architect-git-load
description: Load or update a Claude Code skill from a remote Git repository.

mode.description: Operating mode. 'init' runs/reruns setup. 'check' compares local vs remote versions (no write). 'pull' downloads and installs. 'standalone' (default) applies current config and runs the full flow.

repo_url.description: Explicit repository URL or local filesystem path. Takes precedence over all saved config.

skill_name.description: Target skill name within the repo. If omitted, skill discovery runs and the user selects from a checklist.

caller.description: Identifies the calling context. 'proofing' and 'update' apply update_check_mode from config. 'standalone' runs the full flow.
